claims.summary: A large volume of telemetry is not equivalent to a conversation or relationship.
claims.disposition: verify transport, influence, and address remain separate states

claims.summary: Direct relationship needs a symmetric thread schema, memory, and explicit acknowledgement.
claims.disposition: verify the existing thread, ledger, and receipt architecture

claims.summary: Diagnostic symmetry must not erase real evidence asymmetry.
claims.disposition: verify the audit reports no mutual acknowledgement when only one-sided evidence exists

claims.summary: Required responses, active-memory injection, or increased correspondence priority broaden live behavior.
claims.disposition: keep behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
